compiled_state.title: Add implementation_plan.approach_resolution config key to dso-config.conf
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
Add implementation_plan.approach_resolution=autonomous to .claude/dso-config.conf with a comment block explaining valid values (autonomous, interactive) and default behavior.

TDD Exemption: Unit exemption criterion 3 — static config file with no conditional logic.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Config key exists with correct default
  Verify: grep -q 'implementation_plan.approach_resolution=autonomous' .claude/dso-config.conf
- [ ] Comment block explains valid values
  Verify: grep -q 'autonomous.*interactive\|interactive.*autonomous' .claude/dso-config.conf
